text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder who'll win today. I'm leaning toward
Mayano Top Gun since I hear she's a
long-distance prodigy.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Sure, but I really want Fuji Kiseki to do well too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spectators are already starting to get excited
for the race. Meanwhile, at the paddock...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, mine enemy, Mayano Top Gun. We meet
again, and you're just as carefree and innocent as
ever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But watch out. That sweetness of yours might be
no more after today.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Is that so? But haven't you heard?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Long distances are my forte. Did you forget that
in your shock? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I hope you won't run off crying about how you
never want to race again after we're finished!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! What a threat! You should watch what you
say, though.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'd hate for you to be traumatized when those
words come back to bite you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member
text_block_list.text:
Holy crap, did you hear what Fuji just said? That
was so cool! I didn't know she had that side to
her!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Fan
text_block_list.text:
Mayano's so confident today! It makes her even
cuter!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan
text_block_list.text:
Seriously! I have my fingers crossed for both of
them! Actually, wait... Why are they arguing in the
first place?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That was good. Thanks for playing along.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This race needed something to spice it up, and it looks
like we fired up the crowd just the right amount.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! No problem! ♪ I meant what I said, though. Half
of it, anyway!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, what a bold declaration of rivalry! I hope you'll go
easy on me.
